title: Tragacantha longicuspis
taxonomy: Tragacantha longicuspis is classified as a species of legume, more specifically it belongs to the family Fabaceae. This classification is further divided into the subfamily Faboideae and the tribe Hedysareae. Within the tribe Hedysareae, Tragacantha longicuspis is placed in the genus Tragacantha, which is a group of spiny plants. The exact classification of Tragacantha longicuspis can be complex and may vary depending on the source, but it is generally agreed upon that it belongs to the kingdom Plantae. Tragacantha longicuspis is also known by its synonym Astragalus longicuspis.

Further research is necessary to fully understand the plant's medicinal uses and potential benefits.
